channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Redpill me on RV life — 27 replies — 108.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Redpill me on RV life

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-03-20 16:28 UTC

OP

Assume I wouldn't even have to drive very much, just around town randomly.

Early replies (first 3)

62003573
RV feels overkill, I think van life if you're single is better

62003620
trashy neighbors, lot fees are super gay, high maintenance, burn a lot of gas, easy to rob, difficult to sell, buying a used one is gross, and they depreciate quickly when you buy them new

62003633
>>62003573
Van seems like an overkill. I think sedan life if you're single is better.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62003773
>>62003565
If you deal from office like most people here you're supposed to get proper rest in a proper house. Like what the other goy posted, you're going to have to pay for lot fees after you purchased used RV in decent condition (incredibly rare) upfront.

RV might be worth it if you're a nomadic dealer that can do your dealings from and at anywhere in the real world though.. preferably in North America or Central Asia. So it depends entirely on the goyim, what kind of goy are you?

62003777
>>62003633
Sedan seems like an overkill. I think cardboard box life if you're single is better.

62003892
>>62003565
It’s good, you can finance a good brand one for 10 or 15 years, and make your payments like $400 or less. You can also find a lot to rent for around the same cost as your RV payment, sometimes utilities are even included

62003922
>>62003565
A RV like that costs as much as a small house, your reality will more look like what you call a trailer park

Youre maybe not allowed to park them anywhere you want or even in town

62004450
>>62003565
It only works if you are a traveling tradie that can secure work at a jobs site for months on end and stay at a camp ground. I see this with the data centers they are building in my area. Some of the electricians will have a 5th wheel trailer and use the truck to commute to and from the campground.

62004695
>>62003565
how is an rv good? just have a trailer rvs fucking suck

maybe even build it yourself since people try to scam you by marking them up too much

62004702
>>62004450
Make pallet camper and you can go anywhere

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QpO63kVjFb0

62004717
It's neither here nor there.
If you want something that big get a trailer or small house.
A van is a better idea, ideally a stealth one that isn't obvious you are living in it.
An RV or van that is clearly your home screams PLEASE COME HARASS AND/OR ROB ME.

62004741
Shit insulation if you live in the cold

62004743
>>62003565
The trick is to buy some cheap strip of land then get a used 30k camper trailer and put it on it. Boom, you've got a house with no monthly payments and all you have to do is pay taxes on the land every year.
The important part is to look very hard for a good deal. Someone I know got a very nice one, basically as large as a camper trailer can go, for 30k from a couple who didn't want it anymore. Never, ever buy from dealerships or buy new, they will vacuum money right out of your wallet.

62004847
>>62004695
You need one of them RVs that you can rig to the back of a pickup truck and not take up extra space beyond the truck's original space. There was a guy that lived in one of these in a parking lot for two years where I'm at.

62004973
>>62004847
that doesn’t seem like an improvement over living in a van

62005068
>>62003620
You act like this asshole isn't just going to park in front of random houses and industrial zone "no mans land".

62005158
>>62004450
this. some of the guys throwing up solar farms in western PA lived like this to save a portion of their per diem. might be worth it if you can secure a decent spot at the right price.

62005211
>>62003777
An apartment seems excessive to me; a tent near a sewer and a place where syringes can be found seems more suitable for a single person.

62006081
>>62003565
It can work in certain situations. Most of the time it's just better to rent with roommates or live with your parents. There are tons of youtubers living in vans, RVs, and even regular cars, some in cold climates.
>>62004741
You can always wear more layers for the cold. There are people who can sleep in tents in the Canadian woods during a snow. The real problem is heat. Assuming you can just spend time somewhere else during the day, if the night is above 30C good luck falling asleep. I once spent one summer without AC in a place where it's 43C during the day and around 28C-30C during the night. I was lucky enough to live on the ground floor so I was quite insulated during the day, and during the night I had to keep the main door open and only have a net aluminium door. I used to keep dozens of full water bottles so they could absorb heat during the day and radiate it out during the night using a fan. Shit like this is not feasible in a van. You will need a power source and use an AC.

62006094
>>62003565
You may as well just get a condo. At least it'll increase in value.

62006433
>>62006081

Yeah, people can technically not die in cold. You are 100% correct. It's not really a "gotcha!" moment if you wear 4 layers not to die when you exit your home when peopl in California literally never have to worry about their clothing. Still there is absolutely nothing you can do in -3 fahrenheit. You can walk from your house to a heated building. Without massive infrastructure people are just dead. You can enjoy a beverage outside at 95 fahrenheit. Heck, or just lie outside in the sun

t. finnish turan

62006466
>>62003565
The worst thing about living in an RV is where you have to shit. Unless you have a proper toilet you're going to hate whatever solution you get. You either shitting in a box you have to then empty by hand or you're shitting in a mini toilet that flushes into a tank under your feet that you have to empty or you're shitting into some weird variation with wood chips or blue Porto Potty water.

62006502
>>62004743
You have to be careful with local laws if you do this. A lot of places won't let you live like that. Helps if you can use a family member's place for your home address.

62008209
>>62003565
I don't think I could live my life taking a shit in a closet

62008225
>>62003565
>Zoomers trying to normalise living in vehicles again

62009772
>>62003565
living in your car is gross. I worked a security job 12 hour shift and had to use my car. Shit fuckin stank after awhile.

62009776
>>62008225
No we're just trying to avoid living in a pod

item.title: YOU FUCKING HOMOS TOLD ME SILVER WOULD HIT $200 ONCE THE STRAIT WAS CLOSED — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
YOU FUCKING HOMOS TOLD ME SILVER WOULD HIT $200 ONCE THE STRAIT WAS CLOSED

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-20 16:23 UTC

OP

YOU FUCKING HOMOS TOLD ME SILVER WOULD HIT $200 ONCE THE STRAIT WAS CLOSED

Early replies (first 3)

62007764
who told you that? i didn't

62007768
>>62007761
It's going back down to 60 dollars before summer hits. You bought the top and that's why you're crying.

62007792
>not buyin le dip

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62007841
silver's going to potato for 15 years. Looking to catch the capitulation wick down to ~$35 in 2039

62007844
i told you to trust the plan and don't be a panican
but you chose not to listen

62007856
>>62007761
I voted for this

62007895
>>62007761
>retards think the government is going to raise interest rate to 20%, which the gov absolutely cannot afford
>netenyahoo claimed Iran's missile production has been completely destroyed, which is absolutely false

62008158
hoping for political shit to pump silver ain't it. the main driver of price is simply supply and demand. and gay Jewish niggers illegally dumping thousands of contracts on the market in minutes to suppress the price. it's that simple

62008711
>>62007761
>YOU FUCKING BOTS TOLD ME SILVER WOULD HIT $200 ONCE THE STRAIT WAS CLOSED
ftfy. also, you did this to yourself you fucking retard.

62009037
>>62007761
Oh it will, you just have to wait. If you want to day trade it or get rich quick, you are a god damned fool. That's why most don't go in on precious metals. They have no patience and are fiscally reckless.

62009042
>>62007841
retard. what is a GSR or a gap up? derp.

62009745
>>62007761
Well I did buy an ounce when it dipped below $70 yesterday. Just want to see if it goes back up or not. Got a rare vintage silver to stick it to the paper shorters before India decouples. Why didn't you buy years ago?

62009756
>he listed to the homosex

item.title: Anyone else actually made it here? — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else actually made it here?

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-20 16:20 UTC

OP

>finally "make it"
>multimillionaire at 31, doctor, taking home $700k post tax in UK, probably top 0.1% if not higher
>it's literally just shit

Anyone else know this feel? Dating is impossible if you want a serious partner because effectively no one is close. You don't need to do anything which is ok but it's so easy to become completely unproductive. Buying stuff kind of pointless even on average UK salary can get a comfy lifestyle. No challenge or anything just pure freedom which is really disconcerting.

Before anyone says it, no I was not born rich. Grew up with abusive single mother on welfare and father thinks she messed about with birth control on purpose to get the bennies, fairly sure this is true. Closest family member is my aunt who is mentally ill. It's a very start contrast going from total no hope loser to current life in 15 years.

Early replies (first 3)

62009296
>>62009286
>$700k post tax in UK
No they aren't lmao

62009318
>>62009296
This obviously is not from medicine I don't practise any more. Income from trading and legally have tax set up so I pay basically nothing.

62009405
stupid lying fucking nigger
at 31 you're barely a specialized doctor and not earning well yet and this fucking faggot says
>I don't practise any more
when he would literally be too young to even seriously practice. Dumbest larp today

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62009438
>>62009286
The Great Regret

62009452
There are not a lot of books and/or content to find written to address the problems of people in the top slice, however some stuff is there if you invest time finding it.
Psychology and political science and maybe other fields, if done well, are all about acknowledging all levels of human competence and idiocy in their model. Find a chicky smart like that.

62009461
>>62009405
So much dumb shit...

In UK you typically become fully qualified doctor at 23/24. This is the age you start practising as a doctor, graduating at 31 is clearly later than typical

After that the most common path is GP (FM in USA) and you can easily be done by 28. 31 is young but possible for a consultant in another specialty.

62009522
>>62009286
>working
>"made it"
no you didnt

62009548
>>62009286
shit larp desu

62009573
>>62009286
>taking home $700k post tax in UK
maybe stop larping?
muh huh I make a million a year and I'm so depressed!

62009658
>>62009286
I made it, had 30M, succumbed to 'just one more 2x' syndrome and now have just 7M after taxes, or maybe a bit less after today's nigger selloff. I'm still levered to the tits trying hit that one last 2x, even after going down 75%. I fully expect to run myself down to my last 2M which is locked up in index funds that are almost a decade old and I told myself I'd never gamble with under any circumstances. I should probably set up a custodian or wealth manager now to protect those funds from myself because I know left to my own devices that when I've burnt through the very last of my gambling stack I'll probably cannibalize that nest egg regardless what I promised myself.

Life was kind of nice for 9 months before 10/10 though. NGL.

62009709
>>62009286
You failed at "Do no harm" so it's karmic justice

62009739
you're lying. physicians make like 200-300k max in NHS.

item.title: WHAT KIND OF FRIDAY IS THIS? — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHAT KIND OF FRIDAY IS THIS?

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-20 16:21 UTC

OP

EVERYTHING IS RUGGING!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62009102
red friday?

62009144
cheapies

62009652
>>62009084
Doge isn't :^}

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62009732
>>62009084
Look the bright side: Murban crude oil just hit an all-time high crossing $140/barrel.

62009743
>>62009084
DXY ni66a

item.title: >world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??! — 29 replies — 58.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-03-20 16:01 UTC

OP

>world go bad gold must always go up
>WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!
Is the most brain dead retarded take imaginable. These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.

Early replies (first 3)

62006969
>>62006961
These are the same type of people who bought gamestop btw.

62006976
>>62006969
digits... checked

62006979
>>62006961
Probably a horde of cunts started leveraging themselves long up the ass when the war started.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62006990
what do we do bros?

62006994
>>62006990
just cash out, what you want gold to go to $20k? are you fucking delusional? fucking psychotic people on here.

62007032
>>62006961
gold is a speculative asset.

62007108
>>62006990
>cash out (+ invert position, optional)
or
>baghold for 20? years

62007658
>>62006961
>it's industrial use.
learn grammar

62007712
>OOOYYYYYYYYY GOOD CRASHED TO THE PRICE IT WAS ONLY 1 MONTH AGO SELL SELL SELL SELL

62007753
>>62006961
Governments are selling gold to buy Iranian and Russian oil

62007795
>>62006961
Might be a good time to buy if you have some extra liquidity.
If the economy does go down the shitter like everyone says, its going to be more money printing.

62007829
>>62006976
not digits you fucking faggot

62007832
>>62006961
I voted for this

62007890
>>62006961
People need cash to buy up other discounted assets.

62007922
>>62007753
oil seems to be a foolproof investment

62007928
>>62006961
China dumping their stack to reap profits and pay for the war theyre about to join

62007949
>>62006961
Good and silver have crashed hard during an economic downturn. This is temporary. They spike back up after the money printing to keep industries running.

62007959
>>62006994
And whats in your portfolio

62009136
>>62007922
> world government tightens emissions regulations tanking the price

now what chief?

62009162
once gold goes below 2500 i may slurp

62009254
>>62006961
>but but the industrial use of gold!
makes up 10% of the usage at most

62009264
>>62006961
Markets predicted geo political uncertainty before it happened and it shot up too much. Everyone tried to do it before actual uncertainty and then bow it happened, it's falling.

62009299
>>62007949
how long does it usually take?

62009322
>>62009299
Longer than you can wait.

62009359
the markets are a casino
all you're doing is gambling
the house always wins

62009589
>>62006961
>the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.
Troll thread

62009613
>gold crashes to the price I last bought at
looks like it's time to buy more

62009655
Economy is fake, take this opportunity to buy more gold because the ones that want to have all the gold wants you to sell it.

62009662
>>62009359
Pretty much, you should know by now who's the house.

item.title: YLYL — 123 replies — 44.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
YLYL

Open thread • Replies: 123 • Updated: 2026-03-20 13:46 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61970837
>>61970830
FUCK LOST ON FPBP

61970841
>>61970825

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61996607
>>61994075
they're niggers, they're gonna make 1-2 payments then close the account it withdraws from, it doesnt matter how much they agree to pay, the banks deal with the bullshit loans, the car yards already made their money.

This shit should be banned, because it results in white taxpayers having to foot the bill eventually.

>>61996581
no anon, i meant the image, of course some sperg would take their mining rig with them while on holiday and just plug it in.

61996696
>>61994906
i've heard about this lmao. This is the sort of crime i approve of, if your company is dumb enough to pay this, fuck em.

61996722
no clue why people hate on J$
he's the literal embodiment of the judeo-american dream of being a rich pimp

61997670
>>61996722
lost again. well done bro. well done.

61997793
>>61970841
that was the best fucking thread of all time

61997820
>>61997816
worth the ban & fuck jannies they do it for free!!!

61998617
>>61970888
This will never stop beeing hilarious

61998894
>>61997816
>a 2nd sharpie has hit the linkie anus
I missed this one. We did get one to do it earlier. I wonder how many of them have done this?

61998962
>>61998894
As the cuckolds of crypto is probably all of them

61999010
>>61979728
Cant tell me these are ragebait by now, the first ones surely were real but 427 months? Cmon

61999152
I wish i could see again the thread of the anon Who got delivered a tonshit of wood beacuse his futures expired or some shit kek

62000194
>>61999152
I saw this posted recently

62000503
>>61999152
Is this the new mandela effect patch?
I swear it was oil barrels years ago

62001140
>>61999152

62001144
>>61999152

see ffs >>61970841

62003933
https://youtu.be/AfnBcOwX0Yo?si=5YrANTCU-oIqP2Zl

62004213
>>61976200

62004292

62006645

62007888

62008522
>>62006645
It gets repossessed and sold to the next financially illiterate basket ball player

62008670
>>62006645
Conflict.

They lack the mental capacity to understand that the car does not belong to them.

https://www.youtube.com/shorts/nUJPltSylbc

62008763
>>62004292

*STOMP*

*CLAP CLAP*

62008812
>>61988313
IDK guys I trust this handsome Indian. Think I’m gonna call him so I can buy more crypto.

62008830
>>61994238
Took me a second and then I spit out my tea

62008870

item.title: GOLD RUGGED — 57 replies — 31.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
GOLD RUGGED

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-03-20 14:41 UTC

OP

GOLD RUGGED
O
L
D

R
U
G
G
E
D

Early replies (first 3)

61998901
Bitcoin too! Wtf is going on!?

61998912
>>61998888
based quads

61998913
Intense bombings that are destroying crucial infrastructure + FED conference in a few hours. It was obvious

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62000784
>>61998888
Nice quads. I used to be able to read PM's really well, it was honestly the only market I was really good at. But the last 6 months it has been behaving incredibly erratically and I'm sure I'm not the only one that find it very hard to predict where it is going.

62003370
so I will short Gold for today, meanwhile feeling out the dip and buying so it will rise in a couple months? Anything im doing wrong nerds?

62003435
I've bene telling you guys for months that oil is the next big thing but you called me a stinky hillbilly and told me I was never moving to Beverly Hills well who is the stinky one now huh? BLACK GODL, TEXAS TEA

62003439
>>61998888
Nice. I need it to drop more. Please make it go down based jew.

62003450
>>62003370
meanwhile I'm feeling out the dick

62003601
>>61998901
Rugs are mooning. Get in before its too late

62003684
HALP!!
HALP!!
HALP!!
OMG

62003700
Good, I've been dying to get back into gold. Hope all these big money homos get rugged hard on oil

62003714
This is the last attempt of the kikes to pump their worthless burger petro shekel.
Shit's fucking dead already. It's all smoke and mirrors by now without the ME oil keeping the petro shekel afloat.

62003742
>>61998888
>'rugs' by 200$ out of a total of 5000$
get out

62003846
>>62003742
Good morning

62003858
>>61999058
With the inflation coming, they will have to.

62003865
>>61998901
Look at the volatility on the stock market, with oil moving within a 10% span every day and shit like that.
People are selling their paper gold so they can gamble on the potentially more profitable shit.

62003963
Babbys first red week

62004017
why the fuck is gold dumping? i'm guessing leveraged niggers are deleveraging?
I mean the world is on the brink of collapse why would you dump gold now

62004022
>>62004017
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hVZOfRW67M

62004042
>>61998888

me finna buy here

62004048
>>62003435
>Texas Tea
Also known as gomutra.

62004272
Just sold everything.

It's over bros. I feels so dumb..

62004291
>>62004017
Dude people are so fucking dumb. "Duhhhhh gold is a safe haven so that means it has to go up when I want it to".

Dipshit - think for a second. Ppl spent years buying gold in case it "all goes to shit" and now it's starting to "all go to shit" and you're shocked they're selling their end of the world hedge? How fucking dumb are you outside of here be fr.

Look at what gold did from 2006-2012. Jesus christ some ppl never fucking even try to learn.

62004296
>>62004017
The end of the modern world was priced in. Thanks for playing. Its just a rock, bro.

62004302
>>62004017
Sry but what really pissed me off was you talking ab deleveraging even though margin requirements have been going down this was really ur fault if u think about it

62004309
>>61999090
I won't have kids but I'll show my niece and nephew my gold purchases from 2021.

62004600
>>62004017
>I mean the world is on the brink of collapse why would you dump gold now
paper gold is worthless for a scenario like that

62005322
Idk how to dollar cost average so whatever I put in I just buy by the percentage it went down

62005367
>>62004600
>paper

62008264
>>61998888
gold is unruggable, small fluctuations like this dont matter

62009069
>>61998888
nice quads retard. also this points to the big players trying to close the exits by putting up a smoke screen. the system is imploding and they don't want anyone running for actual hard assets or assets outside of the system. this is a warning from them showing their hand. they are scared as fuck.

the rips we saw in January were breaches in a the dam. they are trying to shore that up with tape. it's still leaking.

62009076
>>62008264
>gold is unruggable
this in absolute terms. but in the short terms it easily shakes off paper handed retards who babysit the ticker and shit themselves when the price drops 3% and immediately sell like the losers they are.

62009209
just buy the dips

item.title: Dollar = Doge — 9 replies — 12.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dollar = Doge

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-20 15:47 UTC

OP

I know, I know, Doge is a memcoin, but at this point so is the dollar. It's just a meme that's been around longer and has a stronger reputation. Well Dogecoin is steadily gaining a similar status whether you see it or not. If you could imagine it, why wouldn't Doge become the new Dollar. I mean it already shares the first two letters as the "Do"llar. It's got a strong community backing. The Goverment brought in a legitmate DOGE department. Elon Musk has already used it as a sort of gift shop trial run for Tesla. He even recently dropped another meme AI video of him as the Dogefather. Doge-1 space mission might be launching this year. DOGE was one of the 16 cryptos that made it to the list for Clarity or potential Clarity, as commodity. X payments going live in April, with rumors saying 4/20 Dogecoin implementation or maybe news update on its integration.

I'm sure there is even more things I'm missing, but bottomline, who truly knows the future of Crypto and which ones will take over. Dogecoin seems like it may be ramping up for something much bigger than others have precieved.

Early replies (first 3)

62009117
>>62009107
Doge will be the #2 coin soon. Doge is the new ETH killer.

62009134
>>62009107
Its unironically better money than USD
That's not a high bar, fiat is just such shit
What happened to all the crypto payment processor protocols (some advertising doge) that were supposed to be rolling out last year?
Its like the whole bullrun narrative (I.e. actually doing shit with the technologies we have available) hit the pause button because of political bullshit

62009147
>>62009117
That's a huge stretch, but it's in the number 9 slot on coinmarketcap and X payment integration could 100% skyrocket it. I hope so.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62009167
>>62009134
Fiat is shit, but was good when backed by gold. I agree it would be nice to see society using technology to its full potential, but I still think technology for the masses is a little too much to handle, especially Boomers, and in general money related technology needs lot of R&D testing to prove out the bugs.

62009223
>>62009147
It would only have to be $1.50~ to overtake ETH. And once you realize that Doge could literally triple in price 0.30 in a day or two from those big red short candles, 1.50 becomes really possible.

62009247
>>62009223
WoW, suppose you're right. I didn't think it was that close in comparison to ETH. This makes my thread post even more relevant to the potential of Dogecoin. Thanks for your response. This just re-enforces Dogecoin more.

62009312
>>62009107
DOGE is the silver to BTC gold.

62009330
>>62009312
I'm down with that! (^o^)

62009592
>>62009247
I believe in doge
Not because its DA BESTEST but because its ascent would be such a slap in the face to srsbzns projects that all got coopted and nerfed into the ground (like btc to an extent); mass adoption would be the funniest outcome, and therefore fitting for fake and gay clownworld

item.title: Traded half of my $ICP for $PEPE after realizing that mission 70 isn't going to pass. — 11 replies — 11.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Traded half of my $ICP for $PEPE after realizing that mission 70 isn't going to pass.

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-20 15:34 UTC

OP

I like the project but this isn't going to work if you let hunchbacks make decisions regarding inflation. Dfinity you fucked up.

Early replies (first 3)

62008537
>>62008484
The reason why I went with $PEPE
1. No inflation
2. 2nd biggest memecoin on ETH
3. Most recognizable meme outside of crypto
4. Midterms are coming and Pepe is strongly tied with politics.
5. 6x to 10x higher volume than ICP.

62008557
>>62008484
Yes, but what about passion in all of this?

62008618
Pepe vs Doge

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62008626
>>62008537
I was thinking of asking why when I clicked but you were already ahead of it. Interesting. I guess it could rally similarly to people buying those MAGA hats? It's like virtual merch to most people if things go a certain way?

62008661
>>62008484
Dfinity usually votes on the last day and they have ~20% of the voting power with an extra 10 delegated. It's already passed

62008667
>>62008661
>Dfinity usually votes on the last day and they have ~20% of the voting power with an extra 10 delegated. It's already passed
I hope so I still got 1000 ICP left

62009269
>>62008484
Is this scam going to ever pump to $10-14 for 2 days again so that baggies can exit? It does that twice a year, right?

62009303
>>62009269
>It does that twice a year, right?
It reached over 10 dollars in 2023, 24 and 25.
Now that it has more partnerships and a more advanced eco system I think it should happen again but not with this current economy.

62009344
>>62009303
I just need to remind myself that next time I hear hype about Caffeine or Pakistani schools or about how everyone is about to use it, it's time to sell and (maybe) buy at a new ATL for when it scams again.

I don't see any other "major" alts pumping and dumping as well as this.

62009486
>>62009344
>I don't see any other "major" alts pumping and dumping as well as this.
bah bro icp is no scam it just has terrible tokenomics and a hunchback problem; that's why I had high hopes for mission 70

62009530
>>62009486
I have no hope left - ICP has no mission. There is nothing remotely realistic that it can sell.

1. Nobody cares about Caffeine over Cursor / Claude - sure it's "self-hosted", but other than that there is no reason to use it.
2. Nobody is switching from major cloud providers. This is exacerbated by the fact that I can't really host a node even if I wanted to.
3. Motoko a shit. Whole web assembly narrative is dead.
4. It's harder to use than ALGO, which is also dead, and at least ALGO had the whole DiFi narrative going, but that's dead now too.

Not even hating, I just don't see it. And that's not even mentioning tokenomics, how many ICP unlocking to dump in the next 2 years to dump again?

Would love to be convinced otherwise.

item.title: LINK is starting its hyper super cycle once in a lifetime run. — 78 replies — 11.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
LINK is starting its hyper super cycle once in a lifetime run.

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-03-20 09:39 UTC

OP

LINK is starting its hyper super cycle once in a lifetime run. Hope your bags are packed. This is unironically the moment we've been waiting for.

Early replies (first 3)

61990544
Are you saying artemis wasn't a larp

61990577
>>61990540
It’s gonna dump soon. We have been doing this dance for almost a decade now. Sadly there is not much to expect until we have actual real life adoption.

61990580
>>61990540
Its 5% bro, wake me when we pass $30

Insider trading on the clarity act is unlikely

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61994241
>>61993517

61994249
>>61990540
XRP is mogging us, it’s up 10% we are only up 4%. By the way 10% for XRP is ~10 billion in increased mcap more than chainlinks market cap….

61994261
>>61990544

61994286
>>61994261

61994326
>>61994286

61994330
>>61994326

61994642

FOR YOUR RIGHT
TO HATE LIIIIINKIIIIEES

61994646

an hero NOW

61994741
>>61990540

61994752
>>61993046

61994758
>>61994752

61995921
>>61993046

61995937
>>61990540

61996432
just got to 14k linkies, keep stackin

61997084
I AM SORRY FOR DOUBTING I KNEEL

61997164
>>61993046

61998976
>>61991990
the profoundness of this post

61999433
>duuuuuuuuuuuuuude i'm in a secret!!!!

oh yeah?

>yeah duuuuuuuuuuude i i i'm early!!!

so you're early to an altcoin that went 200x 6 years ago? are you sure?

>duuuuuuuuuuuude y y yer an xrp fudder

why did you bring up xrp

>duuuuuuuuuuuuuude you jack off!!!

umm ok this is getting weird

61999453
I just read the whitepaper and I didn't see anything about the tokin being necessary.

62002606
>>61999433
pool's still closed dude

62003757
I've been here for about 10 years and only scroll without posting but I must inquire, what is wrong with you people? Is there a reason behind this irrational obsession with a coin that's been dead for years? There's absolutely no way in hell someone has been paid for 10 years to flood the board with chainlink spam.

Is this some profound ironic doomkino comedy only for those with an exquisite palate?

62003759
>>62003757
Peel

62003788
>>62003759
these posts will continue until morale improves

62003864
>>62003757

62006127
>>62003757
Dude, they are shills.
Link is just the personal fundraiser/patreon of sergey, is a scam.

62007865
>>62003759

62008189

62008359

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 83 replies — 10.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 83 • Updated: 2026-03-20 08:53 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61981809
https://polkadothalving.com/ 1h

61981826
>funding rate at -0.1

Sheesh, I've never seen it that low

61983532
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2032546667421909092
"
Polkadot’s issuance model upgrade is scheduled to coincide with Pi Day on March 14.

This protocol change introduces, among others:
‣ A maximum supply of 2.1B DOT, of which ~80% has already been issued.
‣ A DOT emission rate reduction by ~53% on March 14, and further reductions are scheduled over time.

These changes were proposed by the community and ratified by OpenGov as part of an ongoing effort to limit long‑term issuance while maintaining incentives and providing a transparent, predictable issuance schedule.
"

61984347
>>61981809
It went down

61984420
>>61984347

>>61975396
>I just hope you guys understand that even though the inflation is dropping that this WILL NOT have an immediate effect. Stuff takes time. If you believe that the price will sky rocket after the inflation drop then you're in for a disappointing experience.
The APY is still 12% desu. It'll take another 10h 40min until the new era rolls around (https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview).

61984446
dot sucks

61984449
>>61984446
>dot sucks
That's great. Women suck too, that's why we love them. DOT is really good at sucking, it'll give you the best BJ

61986812
Tomorrow the inflation will actually drop

61990080
>>61986812

61992305
>>61990080
It's still going up

61992626
>>61992305
ETF flows. New buyers. Selling is slowing. Holy shit. Become a DOThead

61993232
>>61992626
The ETF inflows are kind of mid though https://www.21shares.com/en-us/products-us/tdot. Only 11.5m$, doesn't really affect the mcap too much really, but oh well. It's a start. More ETFs will be coming out

61995431
The golden bull run might have just started. How are we feeling?

61995436
>>61995431
good when return @ 6$

61996036
>>61993232
Can't expect a massive inflow like BTC. Had a decent pump already.

The technicals look stable. Advice. Jump in now while you can

61997405
100$ end of bull run

61997626
Just bought in, life savings. When does it hit $10?

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

item.title: USA is removing sanctions on Iranian oil — 20 replies — 9.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
USA is removing sanctions on Iranian oil

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-20 14:22 UTC

OP

This is going to crash the oil market!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62005086
>>62005061
based bussyent

62005090
>>62005061
stupid, they should be forced to sell it to us for $$30 a barrel.

62005101
The message is that they fucked it up so hard they're begging the enemy they want to destroy to sell them OIL lmfao. Sure, faggot, what about a tariff for Amerimutts plus you pay in yuan, sodomite.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62005178
>>62005061
They've pretty much directly and indirectly destroyed half the infrastructure there, it will take years to repair.

62005184
>>62005061
How many levels of desperation are they on lmao

62005206
>>62005061
lol so these faggots have a little extra reserve they can tap into, but the infrastructure is still fucked. And what happens when Iran begins targeting their own ships rather than allow the enemy to have them? Every day is some pathetic cope after another with these guys.

62005213
>>62005061
>dow is -1,02 % within 6 months timeframe
>no cuts
>oil is 100+
>no investments from the gulf
>the pool's closed
kwab

62005234
Oh my god they’re removing sanctions on 4% of the global oil production… we are saved!!!

Seriously what the fuck does this matter? Does he think the Iranians are going to sell us oil so we can bomb them with it?

62005243
>>62005234
>anyone in that retarded administration
>think

62005246
>treasury secretary implementing a policy with a 2 WEEK time preference

its so over

62005453
>>62005234
He and Israel know what they are doing. Keep destabilizing middle east, which will lead to refugees migrating to europe, which will in turn destabilize europe. At the same time, keep Russia as aggressive as possible. They don’t ever want to see late 90s-2008 style european living quality supremacy again.

62006698
>>62005061
Someone explain the reasoning. If China doesn't get those 140 million barrels, wouldn't they just buy from some other source, increasing demand and price for that source? How would that bring down the prices? It's not like these barrels were completely out of the market.

62006729
>>62006698
Yes. Over time, it's all fungible.

The most likely reason sanctions are being removed on Iranian, Russian and Belarusian commodities is because some countries with small stockpiles are now so desperate to buy fuels and fertilizers from the nearest ship that they are willing to ignore US sanctions, and so the US suspends sanctions to avoid the embarrassment of being unable to enforce sanctions

62006750
>>62005061
Lmao what a fucking joke. Desperation.

62008663
>>62005061
Is this a humiliation ritual? If they were going to embarrass themselves like this they should never have started the war to begin with. What a fuckup.

62008682
>>62005234
Its not like Iran couldnt make use of the payments.

62008783
>>62006729
Sounds accurate

62008815
>>62008663
>Is this a humiliation ritual? If they were going to embarrass themselves like this
this is the trump presidency in a nutshell.

62008854
>>62008682
The idea behind avoiding destruction of their oil is to leave them something to surrender to. If that was gone they would truly be on deaths ground with nothing left to lose. By leaving them something to lose, you increase leverage for a negotiated settlement. Without the oil they have 0 reason to negotiate, with there may be a situation where they say fuck this let's focus on the oil gains

62009078
>>62006698
>>62006729
>>62008854
3 out of 20
15% non indian posts
Grim

item.title: what should I do with my last $100? — 16 replies — 9.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
what should I do with my last $100?

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-20 14:44 UTC

OP

im a poorfag working a walmart tier job and put $500 gambling money into an app when this iran shit started.
i figured gas would go up, food would go up, economy besides defense would shit the bed.
i have one wheat call for november. the rest of the money i gambled on SPY. The market was red today so I bought puts at 655. I was about to go green today when Bibi materialized and cat a Jewish spell of uno reversal and i got annihlated.
i have $104 dollars left. what should i do tomorrow to make enough to buy a shotgun to kms?

Early replies (first 3)

62006930
>>62006925
oof that is rough buddy honestly if u are that poor nothing will matter.. u need to get a better job.

Really with 100 bux its pointless, just gamble it on roulette maybe u can win a few thousand dollars idk

62006937
>>62006925
Don't use leverage. No calls. No puts. Be VERY careful with margin. Buy AI / robotics stocks. Use Claude to find them. Stay away from prediction markets. Don't buy too much crypto. Only buy blue chip crypto. Not financial advice. Stay strong fren.

62006953
You don't need a shotgun. Just say you're an Iranian leader and they will drone strike you.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62006967
Kneepads

62006975
>>62006967
ill just murder and rob someone like you before i sell my body

62006984
>>62006975

62006989
>>62006984
kek you got me
meet me behind the walmart and ill give you that blowjob

62007007
>>62006989
Okay. Be there or you're gay.

62007199
>>62006925
100x bitcoin short on hyperliquid, just wait for a setup.

62007231
>>62006925
All in Fartcoin, it's the only way to make it in 2026.

62007803
>>62006925
You can't even afford a shotgun lmao. Make a leverage trade in the opposite direction oil opens at tomorrow. Futures are saying red so if it stays that way go long. Make sure to save $10 for thrift store kneepads and mouthwash.

62007808
>>62006925
Lol you are brown. Better off buy some booze with those hunnies

62007873
Silver or hold. Everything else is dumping. Oil maybe if you know what you are doing.

62009142
>>62006925
Buy non-perishable food that is on sale. It will save you in the short term. Going in on some bet will just have you lose it all and cry. You DO NOT have money to piss away right now. Try again when you have a grand and have your basal needs covered (food, housing, clothing, transportation etc).

62009150
>>62006925
Short oil

62009226
>>62006925
See if ULINE has any openings near you

item.title: Bitcoin is being replaced — 16 replies — 7.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin is being replaced

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-20 14:23 UTC

OP

This is, with my whole hearted belief, the next Bitcoin.

Last year there were murmurs here of Bitcoin being set to be artificially under attack in 2026 in order to make way for a biometric UBI blockchain.

All wars are bankers wars.

Anon posted a website that since went down (kingtree.net) and had the archives scrubbed. On it was a forum from 2006 to 2009 that laid out the original code and implementation of Bitcoin. The code was, per the post and forum, stolen and commodified. Satoshi was there.

At the same time, the url ankh.cash was registered and dormant. Same name of the kingtree protocol (ANKH). The blockchain running since 2006 went offline, but is now live and open source on the ankh.cash url. It's been made public on February 28 2026 at 3:33am ET (numerology relevance) on Github.

I've monitored it since, and over the past two weeks, at the start of the Iran and Israel war, it began verifying biometrics and users onto the chain and distributing.

I downloaded a node and went through the biometric data. From my analysis and attempts at deciphering - it is being implemented in early stages in South America, South East Asia, and East Africa - the global south. Based on phenotypes of facial ratios.

The financial system is set to be imploded on purpose to make way for Ankh and its derivatives. Biometric blockchain based UBI for the masses - one code, one hash and tokenization of people's entire livelihood.

Early replies (first 3)

62008048
>>62008039
big if true

62008050
>>62008039
Ahhh man
*checks pants*
Yeah I've got some nasty poopie in there.
*Takes pants off and tips them upside down*
Ahhh man now it's all in your thread.

Financially speaking I this will decimate me and that's why this is on topic.

62008079
keep me posted

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62008083
>>62008039
>>62008048
>>62008050
>>62008079

samefag

62008088
>>62008083
fagsame

62008092
>>62008088
famesag

62008099
>>62008083
all me

62008108
>>62008092
sagfame

62008109
>>62008083
You're pointing and screaming into the void

62008323
>>62008039
When bitcoin came out, it wasn't the next anything, it was itself.

62008333
>>62008039
>capped at 9 billion
I thought it was 500m

62008341
>>62008039
Yeah say hello to those who understand face training, bone health, hormones and the light angles...woman can even play with makep and face fillers too...this cannot be just that simple

62008358
Ok so Whats the ticker ANKH is like $200 mcap cant buy it on SOL

62008512
>>62008358
>buy it
buy it? as a goy? ahahaha
you vill have to work for zem

62008699
theres literally no point to buying this because it literally says its to allocate 2.7 million ie 1 ankh per person via biometric identification.

Sorry but you have a critical flaw in your shillcoin, theres no reason to buy

62009087
>>62008333
0.0
Can't tell if blessed or cursed digits
